title: Aisa Feels the Danger
description: Skypieans and Shandia face Enel’s lightning judgment as the battle becomes a desperate fight to save everyone beneath the clouds.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this scene focuses on Enel, Luffy, Nami, Aisa, Wyper. Skypieans and Shandia face Enel’s lightning judgment as the battle becomes a desperate fight to save everyone beneath the clouds.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: With my ark Maxim now flying,

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: A future I want...?...Yes, you're right.

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: ...But if I go with you now,

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Even Usopp and Sanji are gone!

summary: Skypieans and Shandia face Enel’s lightning judgment as the battle becomes a desperate fight to save everyone beneath the clouds.
